home.cta_band_title: Ready to discover your best skin?

about.title: Afrodita — where beauty finds its voice.
about.sub: And it sings in harmony with your happiness!
about.story: Salon Afrodita is the place where beauty finds its voice. Not loud or forced, but gentle, like the music of a stringed instrument. Every touch of a specialist is a note. Every procedure — a melody composed especially for you.
about.heritage: We started as a beauty salon in the heart of Chișinău, and became a space where people rediscover their confidence, smile, and authentic selves.
about.team: Our team is like a well-tuned orchestra — each specialist contributes to a symphony of elegance and balance.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.sub: We're here to help you highlight your natural beauty.
contact.welcome: We are happy to welcome you! Book now.
